validation_checks.description: Stream made no modifications to any existing files
No code was written, no runtime modified, no features introduced
All findings derived from existing artifacts, vault pages, and recovery stream outputs
PIOS_CURRENT_CANONICAL_STATE.md, TERMINOLOGY_LOCK.md loaded per G2 obligation
AMOps/vault sufficiency assessed with explicit YES/PARTIAL/NO verdict (PARTIAL) and 9 remaining weak points identified
Historical ontology confidence assessed: 38 fully evidenced, 7 strongly inferred, 4 still unresolved — all explicitly separated
PATH A stages assessed with: 5 missing canonical artifacts, 1 stale vault page, 3 weakly documented transitions, 3 reconstruction assumptions not frozen
End-to-end traceability assessed: YES with 3 minor gaps. Complete chain diagram produced with per-layer coverage table.
Master document assessed: mature enough (YES), 8 sections to include, 10 exclusions, recommended vault location, prerequisite identified
A5a reassessed across all 6 sub-questions (A-F) with nuanced evidence-based answers distinguishing 'architecturally wrong' from 'exposed useful structural truth'

Future governance discipline defined: investigation discipline (5 allowed, 4 forbidden), vault discipline (lifecycle + staleness + anti-hoarding), traceback discipline (mandatory protocol), anti-rediscovery discipline (cost model + protocol), drift detection (4 mechanisms)
CROSSWALK_AND_RECONCILIATION.md identified as STALE — says 'NOT IMPLEMENTED' for implemented capabilities (ReconciliationCorrespondenceCompiler, 5-level graduated model)
PI.BLUEEDGE.CROSSWALK-AND-RECONCILIATION-RECOVERY.01 findings fully consumed as input to this assessment
PI.BLUEEDGE.A5-CANONICALIZATION-AND-REPLAYSAFE-OPERATIONALIZATION.01 findings and artifacts fully consumed as input to this assessment
Assessment consumed existing findings — did not re-investigate what recovery streams already answered
All 10 mandatory deliverables produced: 7 assessment documents + execution_report.md + validation_log.json + CLOSURE.md
All artifacts written to docs/pios/PI.CANONICALIZATION.END-TO-END-LOCK.01/ per CLAUDE.md §8
